message:
fix(h2): enforce max_concurrent_streams for incoming remote-initiated streams

stream.rs get_or_create() created new streams from the remote peer
without checking the locally-advertised max_concurrent_streams limit.
A malicious client could open unlimited concurrent streams on a server,
violating RFC 7540 Section 5.1.2.

Fix: before inserting a new remote-initiated stream, check if the
active stream count has reached max_concurrent_streams. If exceeded,
return REFUSED_STREAM error per the RFC. Uses the same amortized
O(N) scan + prune pattern as allocate_stream_id.

Also audited: h2/connection.rs (3405L), transport/aggregator.rs (3782L,
1 MEDIUM symbol-loss bug noted — bead filed), gen_server.rs (6443L, SOUND).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
